tool_args.label: M60 SBS

payload.description: M60 SBS route from Amsterdam/125th St in Manhattan to LaGuardia Airport in Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: The route starts at Amsterdam/125th St, goes south to 116th St, then east to 106 St, then north to 125th St. It then crosses the RFK Bridge into Queens, following Astoria Blvd and Astoria Blvd/Steinway St, ending at LaGuardia Airport.
